checks.message: scanner tooling preflight skipped due to mock or skip flags

runtime.message: scanner tooling preflight skipped due to mock or skip flags

applied_changes.description: Normalized viewport settings to an accessible value.
Added aria-label="Link" to an empty link.
Added an empty alt attribute to an img element missing alt text.
Added aria-label="Button" to an icon-only button.
Wrapped list content with a list item element.

findings.current: Heading levels should only increase by one
Lists must contain only li elements
Review whether focused elements remain at least partially visible.
Review whether focused elements remain fully unobscured in enhanced scenarios.
Review whether focus appearance meets WCAG 2.2 requirements.
Review whether dragging interactions have a single-pointer alternative.
Review whether targets meet minimum target size requirements.
Review whether help mechanisms remain consistent across pages.
Review whether redundant-entry protections are provided where needed.
Review accessible authentication without cognitive function tests.

fixes.description: Allow zoom and avoid viewport settings that block reflow or text resize.
assisted_steps: Identify the affected DOM node and confirm the semantic role expected by WCAG.
Apply a minimal structural change that preserves existing behavior and layout.
Re-run scanner checks and validate keyboard/screen-reader behavior manually.
verification_rules: The finding no longer appears in scanner output for the modified target.
Keyboard navigation and focus order remain functional after the change.

framework_hints.react: Prefer semantic JSX and explicit aria/label props.
framework_hints.vue: Bind semantic attributes explicitly in templates.

framework_hints.html: Use semantic HTML and explicit accessible names.
framework_hints.react: In JSX, ensure every has an explicit alt prop; keep icon-only media as alt="".
framework_hints.vue: In Vue templates, provide alt or :alt bindings for each img element.
framework_hints.nextjs: For next/image, require alt on every <Image> usage and keep decorative media alt="".

framework_hints.html: Use semantic HTML and explicit accessible names.
framework_hints.react: Prefer aria-label props for icon-only JSX buttons and keep visible text when present.
framework_hints.vue: Use aria-label or v-bind:aria-label on icon-only template buttons.
framework_hints.nextjs: Apply the same button-name rule in app/layout and client components; avoid empty interactive controls.

fixes.description: Use a logical heading hierarchy without skipping levels unnecessarily.
